description_long: This is a medium-sized, cylindrical bottle with a long neck and a white cap. The front label is prominently marked with a large red 'A1' logo, bordered in gold, and additional blue and white text below, suggesting it is a branded condiment bottle, likely A1 Sauce. The bottle is primarily dark brown, indicating it is filled with a dark liquid, and the label wraps partially around the sides. The back and side views show nutritional and product information in smaller text, with a red band at the bottom of the label. The cap appears to be a screw type, and the bottle is made of glass or plastic with a glossy finish. There are no visible signs of damage or deformation, and the bottle is fully sealed.
description: A dark brown condiment bottle with a white screw cap and a large red 'A1' logo on the front label, featuring gold, blue, and white accents. The bottle is glossy and appears to be filled with liquid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large red 'A1' logo, gold border, and blue/white text on the main label.
description_view_1: Front-side angle revealing the side label with nutritional information and the red band at the bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back label with blurred text and a mostly brown bottle body.
description_view_3: Back-side angle showing the side label and the transition between the front and back labels.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large red 'A1' logo on the front label with gold border, blue and white text below, and a red band at the bottom of the label. Additional text and branding visible on the side and back labels.
